canonical_definition: An optimized variant of Prediction-Powered Inference that improves variance reduction by tuning the weight given to synthetic data, yielding tighter confidence intervals and more accurate rankings.
papers: AutoEval Done Right: Using Synthetic Data for Model Evaluation
Regression for the Mean: Auto-Evaluation and Inference with Few Labels through Post-hoc Regression
